# Tester bundle (auto-generated from Cocos build)

This folder hosts the web-mobile build of the King of Survive Cocos project.
**Do not edit by hand.** Regenerated by `scripts/build-and-publish.bat`.

## First-time setup (Leo, one click)

1. Open https://github.com/freewings85/game-king-of-survive/settings/pages
2. Under **Source**, pick `Deploy from a branch`
3. **Branch**: `main` / **Folder**: `/docs` → **Save**

Tester URL (after that one-click enable):
**https://freewings85.github.io/game-king-of-survive/**

## To refresh the tester build

From WSL:
```bash
cmd.exe /C scripts/build-and-publish.bat
```

Or from Windows: double-click `scripts/build-and-publish.bat`.

It builds Cocos web-mobile (~2 min), mirrors output into `docs/`, commits +
pushes. GitHub Pages picks up the new version within ~1 min of push.
